projectDescription: A Python CLI scraper for rental properties in Accra using Scrapy and Playwright to collect listings from Jiji Ghana and Meqasa.
keyFeatures: Interactive CLI with Rich progress UI and multi-site selection
JavaScript-rendered scraping using Scrapy and Playwright (Chromium)
Two-phase workflow: URL collection then listing extraction
Incremental CSV writes with URL deduplication and resume support
Automatic data cleaning for Jiji listings with location normalization
Support for both Jiji Ghana and Meqasa rental platforms
publicApiSurface: scrapy crawl jiji_urls - Collect Jiji listing URLs
scrapy crawl jiji_listings - Scrape Jiji listing details
scrapy crawl meqasa_urls - Collect Meqasa listing URLs
scrapy crawl meqasa_listings - Scrape Meqasa listing details
clean.py - Clean and normalize Jiji data
PropertyBaseSpider - Base spider class with progress tracking
